headline: Malaysia-US Defence Pact Expands to Cybersecurity Domain
context: Malaysia and US signed new defence framework in November 2025 expanding ties to joint cybersecurity operations.

cards.big: Malaysia-US defence pact expands to joint cyber operations
cards.sub: Framework adds cybersecurity to maritime surveillance and training cooperation

cards.big: US Pacific Command establishing cyber training centre at Mindef KL
cards.sub: Centre to train 200 Malaysian military cyber specialists annually from 2027

cards.big: Joint exercises detected 4 state-sponsored intrusion attempts during pilot
cards.sub: Intrusions targeted defence communications and maritime awareness systems

cards.big: China expressed concern over expanded US-Malaysia cyber cooperation
cards.sub: Beijing called for bilateral matters not influenced by third-party arrangements

cards.big: Cyber cooperation tests whether Malaysia can deepen US ties without alienating China
US defence pact expanding to cybersecurity. Alliance scope creep requires parliamentary scrutiny and public debate.
